//: Type-checking for the modern Node tooling only: the build scripts, dev
configs, and Playwright test code (all ESM). The browser core (src/js9/*)
is deliberately NOT checked here -- it is untyped, dynamically-shaped, and
assembled into one IIFE, so whole-file checkJs is ~all false positives;
revisit it with JSDoc types or after an ESM restructure. Check-only (noEmit).
